svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); animation: 250ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-Qx5FgtybXSlo2cdVr_Eq; stroke-dashoffset: 8;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 172px; margin-left: 618px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: #FFFFFF; white-space: nowrap;
